---
title: "EIP Data Website"
description: |
  This site is currently under construction. The plan for this page is a general introduction to EIP and the data/data sources, the EIP mission statement, and other general info.
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: distill::distill_website
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)

```


## Timeline of EIP

This is an example of the potential timeline that can be included to document the history of EIP, when things were introduced, when research projects were conducted, etc.

```{r}
library(timevis)

data <- data.frame(
  id = 1:3,
  content = c("Start of EIP",
              "PGx Study",
              "Peer Volunteers"),
  start = c("1998-01-01",
            "2020-06-17",
            "2018-10-01"),
  end = c(NA,
          "2022-11-01",
          NA))
timevis(data)

```
